title: Junior Business Development Manager at NAREDCO

jsonLd.title: Junior Business Development Manager at NAREDCO
jsonLd.description:
NAREDCO, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Business Development Manager for our Surat operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About NAREDCO:
NAREDCO is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Learning & development budget
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NAREDCO!
